content:
🎮 1. RPG System Fully Integrated

📜 Students create an avatar in Week 1. They:
✔ Choose an archetype (which influences XP gains and play style).
✔ Customize their appearance (color, distinguishing features, literary inspiration).
✔ Select a starting tool or weapon that symbolizes their approach to learning.
✔ Earn XP to level up, unlock perks, and evolve their character.

🛡️ Character Unlockables by Week
• Week 1: Pick an archetype, tool, color, & defining traits.
• Week 3: Unlock a secondary skill or ability (aligned to play style).
• Week 5: Earn a mount (grants a small in-class privilege).
• Week 7: Unlock a special charm or artifact (unique skill activation).
• Week 9: Ability to re-spec their archetype if needed.
• Week 11: Unlock final form transformation (based on cumulative XP).
